title: Mexus' Modpack
description: My Official Modpack - Good for all gamemodes if you want to improve.
body:
## **Mexus PVP Folder**

My mod folder - has alot of FPS optimizations with many more mods in order to enhance your PvP Combat experience.

Many high tiered players have used this modpack such as: Q9Y (LT1) xMexus (Me - HT2)

You will get a massive FPS boost with many essential mods.
For any questions message me on discord!
